title: A Man's Head
writer: Georges Simenon, Louis Delaprée, Pierre Calmann
actors: Harry Baur, Valéry Inkijinoff, Gina Manès
plot: Willy is broke and his mistress always wants more money. A stranger in a pub agrees to murder his aunt, but everything will not go as planned. Maigret will try to separate fact and fiction.
